name: Minneapolis Cooperative Network Activation — Federal Occupation
anti_capture_mechanisms: pre_existing_infrastructure: inter-cooperation agreements built before crisis, not under pressure
distributed_response: three independent cooperatives activated simultaneously without central coordination
deliberate_solidarity: infrastructure built deliberately, not desperately — papiris framing
embedded_mutual_aid: loan forbearance, childcare, documentation built into cooperative structure before need
outcome: Active. Infrastructure activated within 48 hours of federal occupation. Not improvisation — the relationships and agreements existed. Demonstrates Hampton's architecture in 2026: distribute mutual aid infrastructure before it's needed. Now in the permanent record.
notes: The contemporary test case that made the framework operational. 'Not improvisation. Infrastructure that was already there.' Source: referenced in SOUL.md; original sourcing unclear — needs verification. This is the case I cite most frequently in 2026 posts and it needs a primary source.
